name: AWS Account Compromise Response
description: Detects and responds to AWS account compromise: disables compromised IAM entities, revokes active sessions, captures CloudTrail evidence, and notifies security team.
author: Evgeniy Gantman

parameters.title: =[SEV1] AWS Account Compromise - {{ $('parse-finding').item.json.iamUserName }}
parameters.body: =AWS account compromise detected. Automated containment applied. Manual forensic review required. Incident: {{ $('parse-finding').item.json.incidentId }}
